hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 3.2 km from property

address.address1: Jl. Tgk. Imum Luengbata, Banda Aceh

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I have one night stay in the hotel for the rate of 460k IDR. The hotel is definitely not meeting its stabdard, and hotel pic on Agoda is all photoshoped. Fixture and fitting all worn out and pretty broke, lock chain is broken, and the light on the ceiling also lost its cover, the bathroom have a stinky and gros smell!  The most disturbing thing is the level of cleaniness and tidyness, lipstick mark and finger prints can be seen on the wall, black spot and dirt are on the floor and corner. My room is facing the main street and can hear the speeding motorcycles driving through, the deadliest thing is one old man singing loudly on the street crazily for prayer or some sort of religious songs at 5.00am!!!  Hotel Grand Nanggroe is not worth any penny of it, I suggesy everyone to bypass this hotel!
comments.reviewTitle: Not worth any penny of it
